title: Schlumbergeria lindenii
taxonomy: Schlumbergeria lindenii is a species of epiphytic succulent in the family Bromeliaceae. It belongs to the genus Schlumbergeria. This species is native to Madeira, a Portuguese archipelago in the North Atlantic Ocean. Schlumbergeria lindenii is also known as the 'bird's nest cactus' or 'pineapple cactus'. Further classification is available in various botanical sources, including the Royal Botanic Gardens, Kew.

intro: Schlumbergeria lindenii, also known as the 'Bottle Plant', is a unique, carnivorous plant that belongs to the Bromeliaceae family.
